caption: A large white aircraft with a red stripe and the word "РОССИЯ" printed on its fuselage is parked on a concrete tarmac in front of a modern airport terminal building. In the background, other similar white aircraft are visible, partially obscured. A dark vehicle is positioned in the foreground, with text on its side that includes "PASSAGERS" and "COBUS". A red circular logo containing the number "13" is visible in the upper corners of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the camera pans slightly to the right, causing the main aircraft to shift its position relative to the frame and the background terminal. The lighting is bright and clear under a pale blue sky, and no people are visible in the scene.
